channel.title: Update on An Only Urie W Site
channel.description: Recent content in Update on An Only Urie W Site

item.title: Website Update(4-14-2025)
item.description:
Status Update

Over the last few months, we’ll be upgrading our website. The process will take longer than usual. We’ll make some posts to compensate for this, as soon as we finish.

Please feel free to enjoy our current content, while we upgrade our site in the process. Thank you!!!!!

item.title: Site Update(Feb 28, 2025)
item.description:
Status Report

The site had added the T&C agreements:

Shop T&C

Site T&C

They can be found on the About section of the site.

item.title: Disqus Update!!!
item.description:
Site Upgrade Details(Feb 22, 2025):

Feel free to fire away at that post you’ve been waiting to talk about, thanks to Disqus!!!! We’d love to hear from you!!!!

Please remember to be respectful and kind. Thank you!!!!!!!

item.title: Error Link Update(Feb 22)
item.description:
Status Report(Feb 22, 2025):

The guide pages’ link error was fully made by the webdev’s problem of knowing how to link pages server-wise. The error has been fully fixed, and all pages affected in the first place have been updated to show the fix!!!

Thank you for waiting, and have a very safe weekend!!!!!
